context.note: No database migrations required - uses test_flakiness_history from Phase 03
context.flakiness_volume: flakiness_volume = flakiness_rate × total_runs / 100 Used to prioritize tests that are both flaky AND frequently run

objective.goal: Display tests ranked by flakiness rate
Show flaky run history and trends
Link to flakiness history data from Phase 03

success_criteria.criterion: Tests sorted by flakiness rate (highest first)

endpoint.description: Get flakiest tests with flakiness metrics

testing_checklist.test: Tests sorted by flakiness rate (highest first)

implementation_prompt.next_phase: Phase 08: Test Explorer - Most Failing Tests
